texto: I didn't hear you complaining last night.''That's because I wasn't,' she argued.'Then what's the problem?' he asked aggressively.'There is no problem. We had a good time and now it's over.''Just like that?''You want flowers?
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Michelle Conder: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “I didn't hear you complaining last night.''That's because I wasn't,' she argued.'Then what's the …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que humor, cute, problem pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.
